title: astragalus wetherillii
intro: Astragalus wetherillii, also known as Wetherill's milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus wetherillii include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, providing a convenient way to harness its medicinal properties.
